headline: March US CPI vs expectations
detail: Press summaries flagged unusually large moves in energy/gas components; markets debated whether the print was a one-off shock or a broader repricing catalyst for UST yields.

headline: Fed path + UST curve
detail: Rates desks focused on how far the CPI surprise could push terminal-rate expectations versus the prior Fed narrative; two-way flows into the weekend kept duration risk sensitive.

headline: Tech vs value divergence
detail: Nasdaq outperformed while Dow lagged, keeping sector leadership and crowding in megacap tech as an overnight watch item for Asia’s opening tone.
